acceptance_criteria.text: Real network content-plan read-only smoke is completed without mutating requests.
proof: Playwright smoke opened live network content-plan and reported mutating_requests=[]
gaps: Network operating block was not visible in current live data state.

acceptance_criteria.text: Content-plan first screen is more operational and less overloaded.
proof: Added top 'Что сделать сейчас' section and compact 'Качество данных' card with details collapsed.

acceptance_criteria.text: Old or broken plan items without dates can be repaired through a soft auto-date action.
proof: Added auto-date bulk action for visible items without valid scheduled_for.
gaps: Not executed on production during read-only smoke.

acceptance_criteria.text: Bulk news creation warns about items without dates before confirming.
proof: Bulk news review renders warning for date-less items.

acceptance_criteria.text: Bulk skip and move-to-date actions use an in-page review confirmation before writing.
proof: Added BulkActionReview and wired skip/reschedule-to-date to confirmation panel.
gaps: Final confirm not clicked in production read-only smoke.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: source venv/bin/activate && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_content_plan_generation.py tests/test_content_plan_policy.py
known_gaps: Live read-only smoke intentionally avoided all write actions.
